svg.title: MedFlow — Scalable Healthcare Data Platform
svg.desc: Layered architecture: data sources flow through the interop layer into Kafka, then split between the Flink streaming sepsis path and the Spark/Airflow batch lakehouse (bronze, silver, OMOP gold), feeding analytics and ML serving, then the NestJS application layer, then the frontends. An operations and compliance sidebar spans all layers.
svg.text: FHIR R4 · HL7v2 · DICOM · wearables → Delta lakehouse + OMOP · Flink sepsis EWS · governed app layer · all data synthetic
sepsis LSTM · readmit XGB · CXR · NLP
clinician alert ack on the go
